data.name: Legend of Mythos ~Touhou Winter Heart Cage~
data.detailed_description:
Mythos, a mysterious traveler that lost his memories,

the only clue he has about himself is a "Feather" that seems to be contains a mysterious power.

Led by the legend of the feather told in some region, Mythos start to travel wherever he could find a clue about himself.

In the middle of his journey he come to Gensokyo, a land of mysticism of the east.
Here, he meet people that will guide him on his journey.

- 5 Heroines that will give you trials

- 20 sex scene and more with some harems

- 30 miniquests to clear

- and don't forget the cute girls

- pregnancy ending

The player must clear the mystery of people heart frozen over which is mentioned in this winter village myths to continue his journey.
data.about_the_game:

data.short_description: Mythos, a man of mystery arrives in the mystical winter town. He meets a lot of sexy girls that seem to be fantastical even at the first glance. With the dreams of befriending all the girls in the world. Now, he set forth towards his romance saga.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: AMD Athlon 64 X2 6400+ 3.20 GHz or Intel Core2 Duo E6850 3.00GHz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9.0 Compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX 9.0c Compatible
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: AMD Phenom II X4 955 3.20 GHz or Intel Core i5-760 2.80 GHz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: AMD Radeon HD 6450 / Intel HD 4000 / Nvidia GT 710
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX 9.0c Compatible

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: X 10.13
  • 處理器: iMac "Core i3" equivalent
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Radeon HD 5670
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
  • 備註: still need further confirmation
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X Lion
  • 處理器: iMac "Core i5" equivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Radeon HD 5670
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
  • 備註: still need further confirmation
